title: Church Work Day
description: We will be crack filling and seal coating the church driveway and could really use your help. If we could get 4-5 volunteers to come and assist, it would be a tremendous help and greatly appreciated. Whether you can stay all day or just part of the day your help will make a difference. Thank you for helping us care for our church property!
location: Victory Baptist Church - 295 Pleasant View Drive, Kittanning, PA 16201
